backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the bookstore backend, defining data models (Book, BookOrder, UserProfile), CRUD operations for books and orders, and role-based access control via MixinAuthorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented features: replacing Internet Identity admin auth with a hardcoded password prompt, and removing the principal-based admin role check from AdminPanelPage.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering pages, components, hooks, and context for the Gopal Book Agency React app.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, setting the page title to 'Gopal Book Agency' and mounting the React root.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes, QueryClient, ThemeProvider, CartProvider, and a profile setup modal for authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/admin/BookFormMo: An admin modal form for adding or editing a book, with fields for title, author, price, stock, category, etc., using add/update mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/admin/BooksManag: An admin tab that lists all books in a table with options to add, edit, or delete books, using query and mutation hooks for data management.
frontend/src/components/admin/OrdersMana: An admin tab that displays all orders in expandable rows, showing customer and delivery details, and allowing admins to update order status.
frontend/src/components/auth/AccessDenie: A full-screen message shown when a non-admin user attempts to access a restricted admin page, with a button to navigate back to the catalog.
frontend/src/components/auth/PasswordPro: A password entry screen for admin access that validates a hardcoded password and stores authentication state in sessionStorage on success.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: A blocking modal that prompts new users to enter their name and contact info to complete profile setup before using the bookstore.
frontend/src/components/BookCard.tsx: Reusable book card component displaying cover image, category badge, title, author, INR prices with discount, and an add-to-cart button.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Renders the site footer with brand info, quick navigation links, an about blurb, copyright year, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Sticky top navigation header with brand logo, nav links (Catalog, My Orders, Admin), a cart icon with item count badge, and Internet Identity login/logout button.
frontend/src/components/layout/Layout.ts: Root layout component that wraps all pages with a full-height flex column containing the Header, a router Outlet for page content, and the Footer.
frontend/src/components/OrderConfirmatio: A modal dialog that displays a successful order summary including ordered books, total amount, and delivery details, along with a non-cancellation warning.
frontend/src/context/CartContext.tsx: Provides a React context for shopping cart state (add, remove, update quantity, clear) with sessionStorage persistence and derived totals for item count and price.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status through a React context provider and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions including fetching/mutating books, placing orders, retrieving orders by buyer or all orders, and managing user profiles.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts (Crimson Text, Inter), configuring Tailwind, and defining CSS custom properties for a warm bookshop color palette in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanelPage.tsx: Admin panel page protected by a password prompt (session-based auth) with two tabs: Books Management and Orders Management.
frontend/src/pages/BookDetailPage.tsx: Displays detailed information for a single book (cover, price, discount, stock) fetched by ID, with quantity selection and add-to-cart functionality.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Shopping cart page showing all cart items with quantity controls, remove buttons, and an order summary with a proceed-to-checkout button.
frontend/src/pages/CatalogPage.tsx: Main catalog page with a hero banner, search input, and category filter that renders a filtered grid of BookCard components.
frontend/src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx: Checkout form page that collects buyer and delivery details, validates inputs, submits an order via mutation, and shows an order confirmation modal on success.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmationPage: Simple static confirmation page shown after a successful order, with links to view order history or continue shopping.
frontend/src/pages/OrderHistoryPage.tsx: Displays the authenticated user's past orders sorted by date, with expandable rows showing delivery details and status badges.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist/retrieve values via sessionStorage and clean sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, accordion keyframes, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the project's current state (version 3) for 'Gopal Book Agency', recording that the admin panel's Internet Identity authentication is being replaced with hardcoded password/role-based access control, along with existing features and pending action requests.
